__warnings.note: 'Month of Mhoro' translated as 'मरोरो का महीना' — कीप्ट्स 'Mhoro' as Rwen's signature Shona greeting per pack convention. Reviewer: confirm transliteration of 'Mhoro' (मरोरो vs म्होरो) is acceptable.
'Halfway Tree' is a Zimbabwean cultural reference. Translated as 'आधे रास्ते का पेड़'. Reviewer: confirm whether to localise or keep cultural anchor.
Plural-aware string with {{total}} placeholder. Hindi has gendered/numbered forms — translation uses neuter/plural-friendly phrasing. Reviewer to verify naturalness.
Loanword 'मॉड्यूल' kept (English transliterated). Common in tech-Hindi. Reviewer: alternative is 'इकाई'.
'Constellation' → 'तारामंडल'. Poetic. Reviewer: confirm fits the gamification tone.

streak_30.title: मरोरो का महीना
streak_30.description: 30 दिन की streak। Rwen को तुम पर गर्व है।
